Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IEqualizerProfileService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IEqualizerProfileService
  • public class IEqualizerProfileService
extends java.lang.Object
    The Equalizer Profile service

    Handles saved equalizer profiles. This can be used to store a number of equalizer profiles and
    then later apply them as the user wish.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description

      This is a synchronous request which may take some time due to saving to disk.

      Creates a new EqualizerProfile object and stores it in persistent storage.

    • Method Detail

      • getCPtr

        protected static long getCPtr​(IEqualizerProfileService obj)

      • swigSetCMemOwn

        protected void swigSetCMemOwn​(boolean own)

      • finalize

        protected void finalize()
        Overrides:
        finalize in class java.lang.Object

      • delete

        public void delete()

      • createProfile

        public EqualizerProfile createProfile​(java.lang.String name,
                                      EqualizerConfiguration eq_config,
                                      EqualizerPositions positions)
        Create a new equalizer profile object with the provided information

        This is a synchronous request which may take some time due to saving to disk.

        Creates a new EqualizerProfile object and stores it in persistent storage.

        Parameters:
        name - The name of the equalizer profile
        eq_config - The frequency and gain values that should be stored with this equalizer profile

        Returns:
        Returns the newly created EqualizerProfile object

      • getProfiles

        public java.util.List<EqualizerProfile> getProfiles()
        Get a copy of all the stored profiles

        A synchronous request to fetch a copy of a vector containing the profiles.

        Returns:
        A copy of a vector with all of the stored profiles

      • getProfile

        @Nullable
public EqualizerProfile getProfile​(java.lang.String id)
        Get a copy of the stored profile by id

        A synchronous operation to fetch a copy of a profile with a matching id. If no profile
        with a matching ID is found, null is returned.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the profile to fetch

        Returns:
        A copy of an EqualizerProfile object containing the profile's data, or NULL if no profile with
        matching id is found

      • saveProfile

        public void saveProfile​(EqualizerProfile profile)
        Save an EqualizerProfile

        This is a synchronous operation which may take some time due to saving to disk.

        If the id of the EqualizerProfile matches the id of an existing EqualizerProfile, the EqualizerProfile
        will be updated. If not, a new EqualizerProfile will be created and saved.

        Parameters:
        profile - The EqualizerProfile to save

      • removeProfile

        public boolean removeProfile​(java.lang.String id)
        Remove a profile

        This is a synchronous operation which may take some time due to saving to disk. If no profile
        with a matching ID is found, no profile is removed and false is returned.

        Parameters:
        id - The id of the profile to remove

        Returns:
        Returns true if profile was successfully removed, false if not
